title: Biphasic extraction metabolites in algal matrix or periphyton
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"f5fu6","text":"The purpose of this instruction is to specify the different steps of extraction of metabolites and lipids on an algal matrix or periphyton previously freeze-dried and stored in a freezer at  .  ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":190,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"b4442","text":"Principle:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c0g5l","text":"Use of a MeOH/MTBE/H2O mixture for the simultaneous extraction of primary, secondary and lipid metabolites. Extraction is done by combining liquid/solid and liquid/liquid extraction that is carried out twice to optimize yields.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f17hk","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"temperature","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"error_temperature":false,"guid":"BC6693763E0111EFB5FC0A58A9FEAC02","id":0,"label":"","scientificNotation":false,"temperature":"-80","unit":10}}}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"c3tp0","text":"Samples must be freeze dried and store at -80°C","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"192th","text":"Cleaning of the glassware should be done according to the laboratory laundry protocol using UPLC grade solvents or 8h oven calcination at 450°C.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6itpt","text":"All reagents used, including water, must be UPLC grade.\nAs the preservation of samples is done by cold, it is essential that as many steps as possible are done on ice.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"4u410","text":"Use lab coat, gloves and safety glasses and laboratory fume hood. You can refere to the safety rules of the lab.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"64uj1","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9i91h","text":"All waste generated must be treated properly.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9fip2","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1kn6j","text":"Sample traceability is paramount, so it is necessary to optimize sample naming and storage as well as all reagents and stock solutions.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9804f","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1p36j","text":"Gravimetric monitoring of stock solutions is carried out.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"431l6","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2jv26","text":"Write down all the weight as well as the volumes and nature of the internal standards added in a laboratory notebook.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: EXPERIMENTAL CONDITIONS Allow 4-6 replicates per experimental sample o For environmental samples: provide doping with pesticide internal standards (IS) + metabo/lipido IS o For laboratory samples: provide doping with IS of the investigated compound + metabo/lipido IS • Provide a Procedural blank = solvent condition (including or not white field) => 3 replicates • Provide a condition Blind Blank = solvent (=procedural blank with all IS) => 2 replicates • Provide Spikes for validation of the manipulation => 2 replicates o Spike (1) reference sample + (SST + Pest + PE:15) pre Extraction. + IS post Extraction o Spike (2) reference sample + IS post Extraction.

PREPARATION OF EXTRACTION MIXTURES – UPLC GRADE (HERE FOR 60 REPLICATES!) • Prepare an MTBE:MeOH mixture (3:1, v:v) => 150 mL stored at 4 °C for maximum one week • Prepare a mixture H2O:MeOH (3:1, v:v) => 100 mL stored at 4 °C for maximum one week MTBE: Sigma Chromasolv 99.8% for HPLC 100mL (smallest available) (34875-100mL) Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #34875-100ML Methanol Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #M3641 MilliQ water Contributed by users

PREPARATION OF MIXTURES FOR DOPING: SST mix ( 50 Parts per Million (PPM) ) + pesticide mix ( 3.3 Parts per Million (PPM) )mix IS pesticides ( 2.5 Parts per Million (PPM) ) + mix IS metabo ( 50 Parts per Million (PPM) ) + PE (15:0) ( 100 Parts per Million (PPM) ) • Ultrasound 00:05:00 at Room temperature
PREPARATION OF CRUSHED ICE OR COLD BLOCKS • Prepare ice with the ice machine continuously throughout the extraction • Place cold blocks at -80 °C as well as microtube racks

PREPARATION OF BALL TUBES AND VIALS All these steps can be done the day before. • Annotate all tubes • Add 150 mg (± 10mg) of 0.5mm beads to each 2mL tube • Annotate all 1.8mL amber stock vials (duplicate for lipophilic and hydrophilic fractions)

PRELIMINARY STEPS On ice, in the soundcheck room: • Add 10 mg (+- 1mg) of freeze dried matrix per tube containing the microbeads • Record the exact mass of sample added Doping with tracers/surrogates and IS: o Sample approx: 10 µL IS pesticides + 10 µL IS metabo + 50 µL PE (15:0) o Lab sample: 10 µL IS of the test compound + 10 µL IS metabo + 10 µL PE (15:0) o Spike on matrix (or solvent if matrix not available): Extraction yield Spike 1: • Pre-extraction: 10 µL mix SST + 10 µL mix Pest + PE (15:0) o Procedural blank: solvent only o Blind blank: solvent + 10 µL All IS In order to guarantee the cold chain: • For 00:15:00 : Place the tubes and MTBE:MeOH solution at -80 °C ; H20:MeOH solutions at -20 °C • Start the Fast Temp on the centrifuge 4 °C

EXTRACTION 1 Under hood and on ice: Add 1 mL of MTBE:MeOH (3:1) per tube • Cycle to Fast prep: 00:00:15 at 6.5 m/s • Place the samples in ice or at -80 °C for 00:03:00 • Do a second cycle in Fast prep: 00:00:15 at 6.5 m/s • Place the samples in ice or at -80 °C for 00:03:00 Under hood and on ice: Add 650 µL of H2O:MeOH • Do a third cycle in Fast prep: 00:00:15 at 6.5 m/s • Place the samples in ice or at -80 °C for 00:03:00 • Centrifugation: 12000 rpm, 4 °C, 5 minutes Under the hood and on ice, recover the phases in vials stocks (amber 1.8mL) => 500 µL lipophilic above; 600 µL hydrophilic below using a micropipette Save the base for extraction 2 FastPrep-24 5G (Bead beater, MP Biomedicals, 116005500, https://uk.mpbio.com/fastprep-24-5g-instrument )

EXTRACTION 2 Under hood and on ice: Add 700 µL of MTBE:MeOH (3:1) per tube • Cycle to Fast prep: 00:00:15 at 6.5 m/s • Place the samples in ice or at -80 °C for 00:03:00 • Do a second cycle in Fast prep: 00:00:15 at 6.5 m/s • Place the samples in ice or at -80 °C for 00:03:00 Under hood and on ice: Add 455 µL of H2O:MeOH Do a third cycle in Fast prep: 00:00:15 at 6.5 m/s • Place the samples in ice or at -80 °C for 00:03:00 Centrifugation: 12000 rpm, 4 °C, 5 minutes Under the hood and on ice, recover the phases under the hood in the same vials => 600 µL lipophilic above; 700 µL hydrophilic below using a micropipette End of the process • Weigh the amber stocks after transfer of the extracts =>Theoretically: 1.1 mL lipo vs 1.3 mL hydro •Doping o Spike 1 & 2 • Post-extraction: 10 µL IS metabo + 10 µL IS pesticides • Store all vials at -80 °C

HYDROPHILIC FRACTION UPLC-TOF • 00:05:00 ultrasound • 500 µL transfer into clear vials • Evaporate solvant in Genevac : 30 °C , 00:30:00 hydro mode • Add 100 µL H2O:ACN 50:50 and transfer into insert Acetonitrile ULC-MS Biosolve Catalog #0001204101BS • QC pool preparation and dilutions =>Pool 10 µL of each sample in amber vial (without insert) and prepare QC/2 QC/4 Boosting the QC pool with leucine 1ppm at 1/100 • Calibration range preparation: SST mix + Pest mix + PE (15:0) with fixed concentration IS metabo and Pest (Genevac EZ-2, EZ-2, https://www.spscientific.com/Products/Centrifugal_Evaporators___Sample_Concentrators/Genevac/EZ-2_Series/EZ-2_Series/, https://s3.amazonaws.com/pr-journal/7mi2jk6.png )

LIPOPHILIC FRACTION UPLC-TOF • 00:05:00 ultrasound • 500 µL transfer into clear vials • Evaporate solvant in Genevac : 30 °C , 00:20:00 lipo mode • Add 100 µL ISO:ACN 50:50 and transfer into insert Isopropanol HyperSolv CHROMANORM VWR International (Avantor) QC pool preparation and dilutions =>Pool 10 µL of each sample in amber vial (without insert) and prepare QC/2 QC/4 Boosting the QC pool with leucine 1ppm at 1/100 • Calibration range preparation: SST mix + Pest mix + PE (15:0) with fixed concentration IS metabo and Pest

LIPOPHILIC FRACTION HPLC-MS/MS • 00:05:00 ultrasound • 125 µL transfer in insert in clear vials • Dry evaporation under N2 flow at Room temperature • Addition of the injection solvent for final dilution at 1/2: 250 µL of isopropanol + 50 µL IS polar lipids for subsequent analysis of glycolipids and phospholipids for example
creator: Mélissa ME EON
